strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js/React work at multiple product companies (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Current hands-on AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling — directly matches a required skill
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling authorship, plus MongoDB/SQL, Docker/Kubernetes, and AWS experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin is absent and Java exposure appears limited/dated, weakening coverage of the secondary backend stack
Significant career investment in niche DLang ecosystem projects; Vitest/Playwright not explicitly mentioned despite broad testing background

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of fullstack work centered on the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React), backed by strong testing culture, cloud/containerization experience, and rare hands-on AI agent infrastructure work that the role explicitly requires. Gaps are framework-level (Nest.js, Kotlin, Vitest specifics) rather than conceptual, and someone with this testing and architecture background should close them quickly. Overall this is a strong match for a senior IC building internal automation tooling.
